en.pageSubtitle: Daily plan, bilingual review, read-aloud and progress tracking.

zh.pageSubtitle: 每日计划、双语复盘、朗读与进度追踪。

en.title: Joshua Month 1 GPS: Site is the main line, Apollo is the application, GPS is the operating entrance.
en.desc: This static MVP turns the Month 1 GPS document into a bilingual dashboard for daily tasks, weekly plans, priorities, logs, project notes and final portfolio review.

zh.title: Joshua 第一个月 GPS：Site 是主线，Apollo 是应用，GPS 是管理入口。
zh.desc: 这个静态 MVP 把第一个月 GPS 文档变成双语操作台，用于每日任务、周计划、优先级、日志、项目笔记和最终作品集复盘。

monthGoal.en: Use the AIX-prepared dynamic bilingual GPS Site first, understand how AI turns plans, documents, tables and project materials into websites, then build 3-5 small Site demos and a final Internship Portfolio Site.
monthGoal.zh: 先使用 AIX 预先搭建好的动态双语 GPS Site，理解 AI 如何把计划、文档、表格和项目材料转成网页，再完成 3-5 个 Site 小案例和最终 Internship Portfolio Site。

current.p0: Dynamic bilingual GPS Site + basic Site capability
current.p1: Apollo use cases as Site examples

en.focus: Open and use the Joshua GPS Site, then understand how it supports daily internship work.
tasks: Open Joshua GPS Site on desktop.
Open Joshua GPS Site on mobile.
Test read-aloud for the Today page.
Review Week 1 goal and Day 1 deliverables.
Write the first Daily Log with AIX support.
deliverables: First feedback about the GPS Site
Language / read-aloud issue list if any
check: Can I immediately tell what I need to do today?
Can I switch language and still understand the page?
Can I use this page on my phone?
Can I explain what a GPS Site is in simple English?

zh.focus: 打开并使用 Joshua GPS Site，理解它如何支持每日实习任务。
tasks: 在电脑端打开 Joshua GPS Site。
在手机端打开 Joshua GPS Site。
测试 Today 页面朗读。
查看第 1 周目标和 Day 1 产出物。
在 AIX 支持下填写第一份 Daily Log。
deliverables: 对 GPS Site 的第一反馈
如有问题，记录语言 / 朗读问题清单
resources: Joshua 第一个月 GPS v4 Markdown
check: 我能不能马上知道今天要做什么？
切换语言后，我是否仍然能看懂页面？
我能不能在手机上使用这个页面？
我能不能用简单英文解释什么是 GPS Site？

weeks.enTitle: Understand GPS Site and build the first simple Site
weeks.zhTitle: 认识 GPS Site，并完成第一个 Site 小成果
weeks.enGoal: Joshua sees the full GPS Site, knows what to do each day, and understands that documents can become webpages.
weeks.zhGoal: Joshua 看到完整 GPS Site，知道每天做什么，并理解文档可以变成网页。
zhTasks: 对比 GPS 文档和网页
完成第一个文档转 Site Demo
zhOutputs: Joshua GPS Site 使用记录

weeks.enTitle: Convert multiple file types into Sites
weeks.enGoal: Joshua learns that Site is not only for GPS; it can organize different content types.
weeks.zhGoal: Joshua 知道 Site 不只可以做 GPS，也可以处理不同类型资料。

weeks.enGoal: Use Apollo scenarios to show that Site skills can support real business communication.
weeks.zhGoal: 把 Site 能力应用到 Apollo 场景，让 Joshua 看到它对真实业务有用。
zhTasks: Apollo 网站 AI 分析

weeks.enTitle: Dynamic update workflow and Portfolio Site
weeks.zhTitle: 动态更新机制 + Portfolio Site
weeks.enGoal: Integrate the first three weeks into Joshua's final portfolio and a daily update workflow.
weeks.zhGoal: 把前三周成果整合成 Joshua 的最终展示站，并形成每日更新机制。

priorities.enTitle: Must complete: Dynamic bilingual GPS Site + Site basics
priorities.zhTitle: 必须完成：动态双语 GPS Site + Site 基础能力
enTasks: AIX prepares the GPS Site before Joshua arrives.
Joshua uses the GPS Site every day.
The site supports bilingual view, PC/mobile view, daily tasks, Daily Log, Project Note and read-aloud.
Joshua learns how GPS, documents and project materials become webpages.
Every day leaves one visible result.
zhTasks: AIX 在 Joshua 到岗前先完成 GPS Site。
Joshua 每天使用 GPS Site。
Site 支持双语、PC/手机端、每日任务、Daily Log、Project Note 和朗读。
Joshua 学习 GPS、文档和项目材料如何变成网页。
每天留下一个可见成果。

priorities.enTitle: Should complete: Apollo application as Site cases
priorities.zhTitle: 应该完成：Apollo 应用作为 Site 案例
zhTasks: 图片 / Mockup / 矢量图前后对比展示
面向 Apollo / Dora 的英文说明

priorities.enTitle: Optional extension: Agent, data and automation
priorities.zhTitle: 可选延展：复杂 Agent / 数据 / 自动化
zhTasks: 美国侧 AI 工具研究

schedule: Open site, test bilingual switch, mobile view and read-aloud
Day 1 Daily Log; mobile screenshot; first feedback
Compare original GPS document with web version; map AI vs IT work
GPS to Site workflow note; Site Structure Note
Convert a short document or project note into a simple page
Compare desktop and mobile; adjust cards, headings and buttons
PC screenshot; mobile screenshot; Responsive Design Note
Add Chinese/English content and test English read-aloud
Bilingual Site Demo v1; Read-aloud Test Note
Show daily records and first demo; give a 3-minute English explanation
Extract structure and English summary from a Word or meeting note
Practice headings, cards, key points and conclusions
Turn a small table into a readable webpage table or cards
Turn hierarchy into navigation, cards or grouped sections
Use Project Note fields to build a project display page
Summarize GPS, Word, Markdown, Table, TMM and Project Note methods
Apollo Website Analysis Table; Comparison Notes
Build SEO, Layout, Content, Visual and CTA recommendation page
Display before/after image cases and explain AI optimization
Image Before/After Page; Mockup Case Page
Create workflow page for vector or catalog application
Integrate website, image, catalog, competitor and marketing use cases
Joshua explains how AI and Site can help Apollo
Week 3 English Summary; Apollo Demo Script
Design Daily Notes to AI Summary to English to Site Update to Archive
Dynamic GPS Update Workflow; Daily Update Prompt v1
Use previous logs to test auto summary and GPS Site update
Daily Log Module v1; Auto Summary Example
Organize 2-3 project cases into a consistent gallery format
Project Note Module v1; Project Gallery Page
Integrate About, GPS, learning, site projects, Apollo cases, logs and next step
Prepare and rehearse final English presentation
Final English Presentation Script; Demo Flow
Present GPS Site, demos, Apollo Site, Portfolio Site and Month 2 recommendation
Month 1 Final Demo; Paul / Dora View; Month 2 Recommendation

learned: How AI and IT divide work
en.reflection: Joshua should be able to explain what he learned, what he built, how AI helped, and how he can continue using this method after returning.
en.next: Month 2 can move toward Apollo, Agent, Research or more complex data projects based on Joshua's interest and capability.

learned: AI 辅助项目学习方式
响应式 Site 产品思维
AI 与 IT 的分工
progress: 每个 Demo 的截图 / 链接
zh.reflection: Joshua 应该能够说明自己学到了什么、做出了什么、AI 如何帮助，以及回美国后如何继续使用这套方法。
zh.next: 第二个月可根据 Joshua 兴趣和能力进入 Apollo、Agent、Research 或更复杂数据项目。
